configurePresets.name: default
configurePresets.description: Configure this repo as top-level; MB_DOT_CLANG_FORMAT_ENABLE defaults to OFF.

configurePresets.name: ci-install
configurePresets.displayName: CI: install preset into build dir
configurePresets.description: Enables mb-dot-clang-format and writes .clang-format under the build tree (no repo root writes).
